basic_details.job_title: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Annamalai University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of Annamalai University (https://annamalaiuniversity.ac.in). A total of 1 Project Assistant vacancy has been announced through the Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First class in M.Sc. Clinical Psychology/ Applied Psychology / M.A. Psychology with minimum of 55% marks.
qualification.details: First class in M.Sc. Clinical Psychology/ Applied Psychology / M.A. Psychology with minimum of 55% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per the CMRG, Govt. of Tamilnadu norms
salary_details.details: As per the CMRG, Govt. of Tamilnadu norms

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Annamalai University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Annamalai University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Annamalai University Project Assistant recruitment is 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant position, candidates must have a First Class in M.Sc. Clinical Psychology/Applied Psychology or M.A. Psychology with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information regarding the selection methodology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Annamalai University Project Assistant recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a contractual job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the project.

faq.question: Q7. Where is Annamalai University located?
faq.answer: Annamalai University is located in Annamalainagar, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 608002.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Annamalai University Project Assistant recruitment is CMRG/eoffice E-671131/049.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not contain specific details regarding age limits or relaxations. Candidates are encouraged to consult the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Assistant post will be as per the norms set by the CMRG, Government of Tamil Nadu. Specific figures are not detailed in the provided extract.
